note: Advisory, report-only. Authors a FOUNDER-RUN git-hooks installer CLI and a NON-BLOCKING pull_request 'hooks-present' check that only WARNS. The sandbox agent never ran the installer, never set core.hooksPath, never touched .github/ or any live git config.
title: git-hooks installer + non-blocking hooks-present check

subject.note: Grounds in the repo's existing versioned .githooks/pre-commit. The installer would point core.hooksPath at .githooks and verify that hook is executable WHEN THE FOUNDER RUNS IT. Not executed here; no tracked file modified.

what_it_proves: install_git_hooks.sh is bash -n syntactically valid and contains `git config core.hooksPath .githooks`, chmod +x of .githooks/pre-commit, and an -x executability verification (asserted by the test); it is a standalone founder-run CLI and was NOT executed in the sandbox
hooks_present_report.py on a VALID sample (executable .githooks/pre-commit + hooksPath=.githooks) -> installed=true, no warnings
a MINIMAL MUTATION (drop the pre-commit exec bit) -> installed=false, flagged 'hook not executable'
a MINIMAL MUTATION (unset core.hooksPath) -> installed=false, flagged 'core.hooksPath is not set'
the report script is report-only: default mode exits 0 even when not installed (non-blocking); --strict exit-1 exists only for the red-run harness and is never used by the CI YAML

hooks-present-check-v1.yml has permissions contents:read only, on: pull_request ONLY (no pull_request_target/push/schedule/workflow_dispatch), no secrets:/credential env, and is non-blocking (continue-on-error + `exit 0`, findings to $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY, no auto-merge/required-status)
the CI YAML invokes the checker report-only (--json, no --strict/--write/--install) and never runs the installer or writes git config (reading core.hooksPath is allowed)
locks_respected: append-only: no tracked file edited; all writes confined to catalog/builds/CI-4/
workflow authored as a PROPOSAL in the build dir; .github/ untouched; existing workflows (incl. brain-loop-autorun-v1.yml) untouched
no-live: installer not run, core.hooksPath not set, git config core.hooksPath not changed, no network, HOME=temp, no git write commands
did not touch other lanes' builds or untracked drops (graph-out/, receipts/l0-*, scripts/*repo_graph*)
exit_gate_B4: CI-4 done: founder-run hooks installer + non-blocking hooks-present warn check, RED-capably tested with report-only script mutations and CI-guard assertions.
next_action: founder reconciles hooks-present-check-v1.yml into .github/workflows/ on approval; founder runs install_git_hooks.sh once locally to set core.hooksPath.
